Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0AF0 "SHOOTTHERAPIDS-C600-0AF0" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $c600 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Shoot the Rapids.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $C600 to set $FF to $F0 to allow the game to run correctly (this is because of a protection check at $0F62).
